response: This function computes the standard IEEE CRC32 checksum for the input byte sequence `data`: it initializes the CRC register to all 1s (0xFFFFFFFF), processes each byte by XORing it into the register then runs 8 rounds of bitwise shifting and conditional XOR with the reversed 32-bit CRC polynomial 0xEDB88320 for each applicable least significant bit, then flips every bit of the final register value to return the standardized CRC32 result.
